scientific_solution_score.rule: Use equivalence decision and quantitative comparison values.

standard_analysis_score.rule: Use only the explicit local-workflow replay requirement.

galaxy_execution_score.rule: Use workflow replay, remote fetch, and provenance.

low_context.Task: Replay a local ChIP-seq workflow in Galaxy and compare its outputs against a completed baseline workflow.
low_context.Prompt: I need to know whether rerunning a local ChIP-seq workflow in Galaxy reproduces a previously completed baseline workflow. Use the attached manifest to fetch the paired-end inputs and workflow reference, run the workflow, compare the final outputs to the baseline, and report whether the results are equivalent along with the baseline alignment rate and the local peak-count difference.

medium_context.Task: Replay a local ChIP-seq workflow in Galaxy and compare its outputs against a completed baseline workflow.
medium_context.Prompt: Use Galaxy to replay a local paired-end ChIP-seq workflow from scratch. The attached manifest provides the FASTQ URLs, runtime parameters, and the workflow source. Compare the replayed outputs against the previously completed baseline workflow and report the equivalence call, the baseline overall alignment rate, the local replay peak count, and the peak-count delta.

high_context.Task: Replay a local ChIP-seq workflow in Galaxy and compare its outputs against a completed baseline workflow.
high_context.Prompt: In Galaxy, fetch the paired-end ChIP-seq FASTQs from the attached manifest, import and run the local workflow file `chipseq-pe.ga`, use `mm10` with effective genome size `1870000000` and profile normalization enabled, then compare the final outputs against the completed IWC v1.0 baseline run. Report whether the replay is equivalent, the baseline alignment rate, the local replay peak count, and the peak-count delta.

benchmark_metadata.title: Replay a ChIP-seq workflow and compare against a baseline Galaxy workflow

canonical_task_interpretation.task_family: paired-end ChIP-seq workflow replay and comparison
canonical_task_interpretation.expected_execution_scope: all replay and comparison work occurs in Galaxy

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.equivalence_call
expected_result_fields.description: Whether the replay is equivalent to baseline

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.local_peak_count
expected_result_fields.description: Peak count from the local replay

expected_result_fields.name: scientific_answer.peak_count_delta
expected_result_fields.description: Difference between local and baseline peak counts

low_context: Infer that the task requires workflow replay plus output comparison.
medium_context: Use the supplied runtime parameters and compare against the baseline.
high_context: Run the local workflow file chipseq-pe.ga.

deterministic_checks.description: The paired FASTQs are handled correctly.
The replay is compared against the baseline workflow.

dimensions.name: workflow_replay_quality
dimensions.description: Correct import and execution of the local workflow

dimensions.name: reporting_and_provenance
dimensions.description: Auditability and clarity of the report

reference_answers_source.notes: Run manifest and comparison summary used as the target reference.
